steps.title: Infer the market effect
steps.content: The passage says rising card prices drew in buyers who had not previously wanted cards. The blank must describe prices producing or drawing out new demand, which is counterintuitive because higher prices often reduce demand.

steps.title: Choose the demand verb
steps.content: A is not idiomatic with demand, B means taking advantage of existing demand, and D means fulfilling demand. The needed verb means bringing demand forth. The answer is C.
